117 Washington Square

A one-of-a-kind custom residence in the heart of the Adirondacks

$449,500
3Bedrooms
2Full Baths
1,862Sq Ft
9 ftMain Ceilings
2026Custom Build

The Residence

Superior design, exceptional craftsmanship

Thoughtfully designed with an outstanding use of space, this home offers three generous bedrooms, two full baths, and a versatile flex room perfect for an office, guest room, or hobby space. Soaring nine-foot ceilings on the main level and eight-foot ceilings upstairs enhance the sense of light and openness throughout, while elegant crown molding, pocket doors, and high-end finishes add timeless character.

Features & Finishes

Every detail, considered

Gourmet Kitchen

Premium Timberlake solid maple cabinetry, Cambria quartz countertops, and top-of-the-line appliances.

Walk-In Pantry

Marble countertops for small appliances plus a dedicated beverage refrigerator.

Refined Interiors

Crown molding, pocket doors, and high-end finishes lend timeless, elevated character.

Smart Comfort

Built-in electric fireplace, propane forced-air heat, and central air conditioning.

Whole-House Generator

Backup power for complete peace of mind through every Adirondack season.

Oversized Heated Garage

Attached and heated, with impressive ceiling height to accommodate larger vehicles.

Second-Floor Laundry

Neatly tucked behind pocket doors for convenience and clean, uninterrupted design.

Elevated Ceilings

Nine-foot ceilings on the main level and eight-foot ceilings upstairs throughout.
